name: The Phantom Knights of Cloven Helm
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻影騎士団</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ファントム・ナイツ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>クラックヘルム
desc: If a "Phantom Knights" card(s) is sent to your GY: This card gains 500 ATK. You can banish this card from your GY; during the End Phase of this turn, add 1 "Phantom Knights" card from your GY to your hand. You can only use each effect of "The Phantom Knights of Cloven Helm" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a "Phantom Knights" card(s) is sent to your GY: This card gains 500 ATK. You can banish this card from your GY; during the End Phase of this turn, add 1 "Phantom Knights" card from your GY to your hand. You can only use each effect of "The Phantom Knights of Cloven Helm" once per turn.
eff: If a "Phantom Knights" card(s) is sent to your GY: This card gains 500 ATK. You can banish this card from your GY; during the End Phase of this turn, add 1 "Phantom Knights" card from your GY to your hand. You can only use each effect of "The Phantom Knights of Cloven Helm" once per turn.

mentions: The Phantom Knights of Cloven Helm
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
